title: Death Omen damages the lowest-HP primary at each turn start

card.rawText: The primary creature with the lowest HP receives 5 damage at the beginning of each player's turn.

effect.value: The primary creature with the lowest HP receives 5 damage at the beginning of each player's turn.

plan.title: Death Omen damages the lowest-HP primary at each turn start
plan.summary: Place Death Omen as field magic and verify the lowest-HP primary creature takes 5 beginning-turn damage.

notes: Read text first: The primary creature with the lowest HP receives 5 damage at the beginning of each player's turn.
Set player_2 primary lower than player_1 primary so the target is deterministic.

steps: Place Death Omen as field magic.
Verify the lower-HP primary takes 5 damage.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Place Death Omen as field magic and verify the lowest-HP primary creature takes 5 beginning-turn damage.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
